rescinded_reason: W28 had no formal release-captain signoff at the time of publication (no docs/releases/wave28-signoff.json was ever created).

W28 declared verified=94.55 with notice-pre-final-commit:true and Functional HEAD 9e607a65, but after PR#17 merge main HEAD became 24742d7d -- the manifest's release_head stayed stale at 9e607a65. Per Rule 14 a stale release_head caps verified at 50; the 94.55 W28 claim was therefore structurally invalid.
W28's seven_by_24_operational_readiness reform retired the wall-clock-soak cap without a paired-evidence rule, so the 94.55 7x24 score was a metric redefinition, not a measured score.
W29 retroactively closed the release-identity break (commit 9add02bc) and adopted 23a30d78 as the first honest verified=94.55 release. W31-L closes the paired-evidence rule for cap-retirement.

verified_readiness.rule_14_basis: release_head=9e607a65 != main HEAD=24742d7d after PR#17 merge

seven_by_24_operational_readiness.honest_value: deferred (no measured soak evidence; cap-retirement pending paired-evidence rule W31-L)

actual_cap_factors_per_rule_14: release_head_mismatch (cap 70 -> further capped 50 by stale-head policy)

scope_at_publication_for_historical_reco: W28 was published as part of PR#17 (Wave 25-28 unified delivery, merge commit 24742d7d).
W28's stated lanes (Lane 4 P-7 TierRouter L1->L3, etc.) were merged in that PR.

The rescission applies only to the verified-readiness numerical claims, not to the merged code/test deliverables. Code merged in PR#17 remains valid; the readiness scoring of that code at the time of W28 close was misstated.
superseded_by: wave29-signoff.json (the W29 atomic close at HEAD b2eea41 / manifest 23a30d78 is the first honest verified=94.55 record)

recurrence_prevention.soak_cap_retirement_paired_evidence: W31-L Track L deliverables (scripts/check_score_cap.py paired-evidence rule + tests/scripts/test_score_cap_paired_evidence.py)
recurrence_prevention.manifest_rewrite_explosion: scripts/check_manifest_rewrite_budget.py (W17-B19) caps at 3 rewrites per wave; W28 had 19 rewrites and would now require captain escalation

note: This file is non-canonical for delivery purposes. The canonical 'first honest 94.55' release is Wave 29 (wave29-signoff.json). This file exists to record that W28's signoff is rescinded and to provide a stable artifact for tooling that scans docs/releases/ for wave-N signoffs.
